name: k6-playwright-dynamics365
description: Performance & Automation Testing Framework for Microsoft Dynamics 365 CE using k6 and Playwright

scripts.test:protocol: npm run build && k6 run dist/tests/protocol/example.api.js
scripts.test:browser: npm run build && k6 run dist/tests/browser/example.browser.js
scripts.test: npm run build && k6 run dist/tests/protocol/example.api.js
